immutability_policy: This definition is mutable only while the study record is DRAFT. Freezing binds its raw bytes. Any later change requires a superseding study-record version and profile version linked to the prior digest.
unit_of_analysis: One predeclared term-contract row, distinction pair, organization-by-case encoding, or governance obligation evaluated against the exact subject and a frozen constructed case.

eligibility: Freeze binds these eligibility and isolation criteria without requiring invented personnel. After freeze and before any case packet, planned output, or result access, an immutable execution-intake artifact names each adjudicator by stable contributor identifier and records role-specific declarations.
No adjudicator authored or changed a case, rule, or analysis after freeze.
No adjudicator accesses another primary adjudicator's codes before both initial ledgers are locked.
Adjudicators act as research contributors, not study participants; no personal, behavioral, or participant data is collected.
evaluator_roles.conflict_rule: A protocol, profile, rule, or case author and the freeze authority may explain frozen text but may not serve as a primary or tie adjudicator for this record.
evaluator_roles.assignment_boundary: Personnel assignment occurs only after a valid freeze and before coding. The immutable execution intake binds the exact frozen manifest digest, names two primary and one tie adjudicator, records declarations and no-prior-result-access, and is cited by every later finding as contributor provenance.

procedure: Verify the subject, profile, category rules, cases, protocol, environment, configuration, and frozen manifest against their raw-byte SHA-256 values before any coding.

Before any case packet, planned output, or result access, publish and digest-lock the execution-intake artifact with the exact frozen study binding, two primary adjudicator IDs, one tie adjudicator ID, role declarations, timestamp, and no-prior-result-access assertion.
Generate evaluator packets using the deterministic pseudonym and ordering rule while removing source role, file path, selection rationale, and all other non-evidentiary author metadata.
Give each primary adjudicator the exact subject, category rules, evaluator packet, rubric, and blank ledger; do not provide the other adjudicator's codes or rationales.
For every assigned rubric cell, record exactly one coding value, a citation to exact subject text, a case-fact citation, and a concise rationale. Do not infer missing facts.
Lock both primary ledgers with raw-byte digests before comparison.
Compute raw agreement and Cohen's kappa using the frozen configuration; report kappa as not estimable when its denominator is zero.
Expose disagreements only after locking. The two primary adjudicators attempt one documented reconciliation without changing the frozen subject, rules, or cases.
Send every unresolved cell to the tie adjudicator, who selects a permitted code or declares the cell AMBIGUOUS or INVALID_CASE with a rationale.
Retain original codes, rationales, reconciliation notes, tie decisions, and all challenged, ambiguous, null, invalid, halted, and not-run outcomes.
Apply the predeclared analysis-specific decision rules mechanically to the adjudicated ledger; no result class automatically establishes claim support or rejection.
Publish at most one atomic finding or terminal disposition for each analysis ID, then close out only with set equality across all five IDs.

initially_hidden: the other primary adjudicator's codes and rationales
necessarily_visible: the frozen method and coding rules
the case facts and evaluation prompts
blinding.compromise_rule: Record the affected cells and timing. If case-role or peer-code exposure occurs before an initial ledger is locked, invalidate that adjudicator's affected cells; halt the analysis if a clean replacement adjudicator is unavailable.

adjudication_method: Two eligible primary adjudicators code independently, lock raw-byte ledgers, and then reconcile. A separate eligible tie adjudicator resolves only retained disagreements. Original and final codes are never overwritten.
coverage_rule: Evaluate all 33 exact candidate term IDs, all 20 declared observable distinctions, both candidate organizations on every organization-targeted case, every case in each frozen source, all 12 competency questions, and all 12 profile integrity constraints. Missing, duplicate, or extra units invalidate the affected analysis.
unknown_policy: Use AMBIGUOUS when the exact subject and frozen facts permit multiple supported interpretations. Use INVALID_CASE only for malformed, contradictory, or non-evaluable case input. Never impute an omitted fact or force a favorable classification.
deviation_policy: Record the deviation before continuing. A deviation that changes a confirmatory input, metric, threshold, or decision rule halts the affected analysis and requires a superseding record; it cannot be repaired in place.
output_requirements: A complete unit-level ledger with exact subject and case citations
Both locked primary ledgers and raw-byte digests
Agreement calculations and all category frequencies
A baseline comparison using matched rubric cells
One analysis-scoped interpretation that states limitations and does not imply adoption or evidence maturity
interpretation_boundary: This profile can report bounded structural satisfaction, challenge, ambiguity, or invalidity only. It cannot establish category truth, completeness, preference over external taxonomies, biological equivalence, external validity, safety, usefulness, implementation suitability, or any mechanism evidence label.
